scripts.start: npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com && npm config set disturl https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/node && npm install -g typescript@4.6.3 @types/node@17.0.23 ts-node@10.7.0 cross-env@7.0.3 && cross-env TS_NODE_SKIP_PROJECT=true ts-node bin/capacitor_start.ts
scripts.pack: npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com && npm config set disturl https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/node && npm install -g typescript@4.6.3 @types/node@17.0.23 ts-node@10.7.0 cross-env@7.0.3 && cross-env TS_NODE_SKIP_PROJECT=true ts-node bin/capacitor_pack.ts
scripts.make: npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com && npm config set disturl https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/node && npm install -g typescript@4.6.3 @types/node@17.0.23 ts-node@10.7.0 cross-env@7.0.3 && cross-env TS_NODE_SKIP_PROJECT=true ts-node bin/capacitor_make.ts
